roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED
DA MOT FOR PROOF OF ELECTRON MONITOR COMPL OR REMAND FOR FAIL COMPLY

/CAL:BW RETURN/BWDNC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING     BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF SALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE        AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD DEFENDANTIS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY; SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE/CONTD:PHC & STATUS OF 1381 DEMAND ON 04-24-20/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONF/LD:04-10-18/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDEREDAND STAYED TO 04-02-18/X: BAIL SET AT $35000/X:LOVE WAIVER/

/CAL:DA MOT OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING COMPLIANCE OR REMAND FOR FAIL TO COMPLY/LDPX:04-10-18 60TH/ORMS/X:DEFENDANT MUST ENROLL BY 02-16-18 IN GPS TRACKING, SFSD ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM; IF VIOLATION, ARREST DEFENDANT/X:CONFIRMED HEARING DATE OF 03-14-18/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:04-10-18/ORMS/CTORD:THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF RELEASE: 1035 SEARCH CONDITION; NO DANGEROUS OR DEADLY WEAPONS; GPS TRACKINGDEVICE AND ATTEND NARCOTICS ANONYMOUS MEETINGS,/CTORD:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF RELEASE OR DEFENDANT REMOVES OR OTHERWISE DISABLES THE GPS TRACKING DEVICE, THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT IS ORDERED TO ARREST AND DETAIN THE DEFENDANT AND RETURN HIM TO COURT,/ /CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PHC/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT'S ACM &GPS REQUIREMENTS ARE HEREBY TERMINATED/
